name: fuse_reduction_curated
description: Same reduction-fusion comparison as the fuse_reduction pair (pytensor fuse_reduction tip 5a5637c93 vs its pre-reduction parent 56139e4cd, on top of the already-merged IndexedElemwise feature), but run over the curated set of indexing-hot models where the FusedElemwise rewriter folds a trailing CAReduce into the fused loop. A local probe (scripts/rewrite_probe/fuse_reduction_count.py) over this set fires reduction fusion on all 15/15 models — 199 FusedElemwise ops carry a fused reduction, covering 445 reductions total. Annotations below are "<ops-with-reduction>/<total-fused-reductions>" from that probe (as-built form). Same 15 models as index_elemwise_fusion_curated so the two experiments stay comparable.
